# function: cidr_first_ip

<!-- Edit here: this is the MarkdownDescription source for the burnham cidr_first_ip function. docs/functions/cidr_first_ip.md is generated from it by "go generate ./..."; do not edit the generated doc. -->

Returns the network address of the CIDR (first IP, all host bits zero).

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Network address (all host bits zero). Normalizes input.
output "subnet_base" {
  value = provider::burnham::cidr_first_ip("10.0.0.7/24")
  // → "10.0.0.0"
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_first_ip(cidr string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidr` (String) The CIDR to inspect.
